owner_authorization: The owner explicitly authorized creation of B4.11 and the separately gated Webull Thailand UAT fractional-preview execution on 2026-07-20.
preflight_order: Validate the active B4.10 machinery gate and all hash-bound machine artifacts.
Validate this active B4.11 activation artifact and its manifest hash.
Abort before credential access if either gate or hash fails.
Abort before SDK import or network access if any named UAT credential variable is missing.
Abort before network access if the report path already exists.
Install the request guard before authentication and preview requests.
Persist only the redacted report after a guarded execution attempt.
claim_limits: B4.11 authorizes one bounded UAT preview probe only; it authorizes no order submission or production access.
The report may classify only acceptance of the eight tested VTI quantities on the shared Thailand UAT environment.
The result cannot prove fills, exact broker minimum, all-symbol capability, production behavior, execution quality, strategy edge, E2, deployment readiness, or real-money suitability.
hard_stops: Any B4.10 contract, runner, report-validator, schema, fixture, B4.11 artifact, validator, or manifest hash does not match.
Any named UAT credential environment variable is absent.
Any production host or account would be selected.
Any endpoint other than the locked authentication paths or POST /openapi/trade/order/preview would be called.
Any balance, position, place, replace, cancel, order-history, open-order, or order-detail request would be called.
Any automatic retry, AMOUNT mode, ninth preview, fourth authentication request, or twelfth total request would occur.
Any raw response, credential, token, account identifier, absolute local path, validation return, signal, position, regime, benchmark, or PnL would be persisted or opened.
Any provider call, paid action, paper-trading claim, edge claim, E2 promotion, deployment claim, order submission, or real-money action would occur.
next_safe_action: Commit and push this activation gate, confirm origin/main and Hermetic CI, then run the locked probe exactly once with --execute.
